title: Online Income $140 to $9,000
author: pixelmonkeyIND
selftext:
I was standing in line at the supermarket checkout, just thinking about my business.

The man in front of me accidentally tore his bag, and his groceries rolled across the floor. We started picking them up together and somehow got into a conversation.

It turned out that he used to work at the same store. I asked him why he left.

He said he accidentally stumbled upon some useful tips for side jobs from user \[amber\_85\] on Reddit. I looked it up at home too, and I have to say, the result was better than I thought. So I'm leaving this message here, \[amber\_85\].
